Local Attractions: Located 3.5 km from Gleneagle INEC Arena and 21 km from Kerry Airport, The Green Room is close to Muckross Abbey (6 km) and Ladies View (18 km). Other nearby points of interest include Killarney Railway Station (3.2 km) and Muckross House (8 km).
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 8.6 for a two-person trip.

The Green Room si trova a Killarney e mette a disposizione un alloggio con WiFi gratuito a 4,3 km da Cattedrale di Santa Maria, 6,1 km da Abbazia di Muckross e 32 km da Monte Carrantuohill. Situata a 3,5 km da Arena Indoor INEC, la struttura prevede un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

hotels.name: Killarney Glamping at the Grove, Suites and Lodges

Chaque suite glamping comprend une chambre spacieuse avec chauffage, lit double, literie de luxe, couverture Ã©lectrique, tapis de coco et chauffage. La salle de bains privative est pourvue de toilettes, d'une douche et d'un lavabo. Chaque couple dispose de sa propre cuisine extÃ©rieure couverte avec un barbecue Ã  gaz, une cuisiniÃ¨re Ã  gaz, un mini-rÃ©frigÃ©rateur, une table Ã  manger et un banc. Profitez de la vue depuis votre terrasse privÃ©e avec chauffage, siÃ¨ges et Ã©clairage. Vous pourrez profiter gratuitement de jeux de sociÃ©tÃ©.

Les Lodges disposent de chambres dotÃ©es de grands lits king-size et de tÃªtes de lit rembourrÃ©es.
hotels.description_en:
Killarney Glamping offers both Glamping Suites and Luxury Lodges, perfect for individual stays.

Each glamping suite includes a spacious bedroom with heating, double bed, luxury bedding, electric blanket, coir carpet and heating. The en-suite private bathroom contains a toilet, shower and sink. Each couple has their own covered outdoor kitchen with a gas barbecue, gas hob, mini-fridge, dining table and bench. Take in the view from your private decked patio complete with heat, seating and lighting. Guests can make use the complimentary board games.

The Lodges have bedrooms boasting large king-size beds and floor to ceiling upholstered headboards.

hotels.name: Earls Court House
hotels.description_fr:
Earls Court House is a charming Victorian-style House Hotel, nestled in a quiet suburb of Killarney, just a 10-minute walk from the Town Centre and Gleneagle Arena. This convenient location offers easy access to the town, while providing a peaceful setting for a restful nightâ€™s sleep.
From our Standard Deluxe Double Rooms with individual character, to our Balcony Rooms featuring glimpses of the surrounding mountains, our traditional Four Poster Suites with spacious layouts, and our Triple Rooms, each room is thoughtfully decorated with antique furnishings, soft fabrics, and classic dÃ©cor. All rooms include a comfortable bed, free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV, and a private bathroom and complimentary toiletries-creating a relaxing space to unwind.
